title: Living in Boulder volg 7-22-2017: 1st 20K TT 34:08 21.7 mph Level 45 Back pack Cat 4

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about missing the previous day's entry due to getting sick and vomiting after a ride. He recaps completing his first 20km time trial at 34:08 (21.7 mph), which qualifies him as a Category 4 cyclist (Level 45 backpack cat 4). He also reflects on riding differences between mountains and flatlands, his illness recovery, and plans to stop listening to audiobooks while riding.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Flatland riding feels unnatural but noticeably faster and more efficient than mountain riding
Plans to stop listening to audiobooks on rides to better enjoy the experience at high altitude
Proud to have officially qualified as a Cat 4 bike racer with the 20km TT result

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle didn't upload his vlog on July 20 because he got sick and vomited all over his bathroom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle woke up late on July 20 because he had a hangover.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle went riding to do his 20-kilometer time trial but had an asthma attack right before starting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle completed his 20-kilometer ride in 34 minutes and 48 seconds.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's average speed for the 20-kilometer ride was 21.7 miles per hour.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels like he's officially a bike racer now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle noticed that bikes feel much faster when he rides in the mountains compared to the flats.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels a sense of forward momentum when he pushes down on the pedals.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle needs to stretch more when riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to try a new route to get over the saddle and climb.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got sick again after returning from his ride and vomited multiple times.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle couldn't drink water without vomiting, but he wasn't too dehydrated.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle decided not to listen to audiobooks because he wants to enjoy the silence.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels that riding helps him avoid asthma attacks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle tries to save money by eating less.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle feels too high to focus or remember anything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has been listening to a lot of music lately.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle forgot to use his new microphone for part of the recording.
